name: Xinjiang Baihuacun Co., Ltd.
summary: Xinjiang Baihuacun Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the coal selecting and mining, and coal chemical businesses in China and internationally. It provides coal, coke, and other coal chemical products, including metallurgical coke, gas coal coke, coal tar, crude benzene, composite ammonia, urea, and other products. The company was founded in 1959 and is based in Urumqi, China.
